series_metadata.series_description: Legal advice provided to clients for questions that do not rise to the level of a formal or informal opinion. Records include, but are not limited to, correspondence, copies of meeting notes, agendas and minutes from client meetings, and other reference materials provided by or collected on the client agency.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 5 years and until no longer of administrative value or retain 1 year after the elimination of the client agency. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of paper immediately. ; Electronic: Retain 5 years and until no longer of administrative value or retain 1 year after the elimination of the client agency., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
